title: Section 10
content: 1[Each Institute shall have the following authorities] namely:-- (a) the Governing Council, (b) a Senate, and (c) such other authorities as may be declared by the Statutes to be the authorities of the Institute.
footnote: 1. Subs. by s. 12, ibid., for "The following shall be the authorities of the Institute" (w.e.f. 13-1-2020).
